Aries L1 Blockchain

The High-Throughput Sovereign EVM-Cosmos Blockchain & Yield Protocol

Cutting-Edge Blockchain Tech

1-Second Block Finality

Engineered using the leading Cosmos SDK and CometBFT consensus engine. Aries delivers instantaneous execution, finality, and sub-penny gas transactions that put older EVM networks to shame.

High-Throughput Security

Designed on a production-ready Sentry Node network architecture. Our validator core is completely hidden from public access, offering institutional-grade DDoS mitigation and state protection.

EIP-1559 Base Fee Burn

Equipped with a native gas model that burns ARES coins dynamically under network congestion. This deflationary loop protects coin supply while ensuring priority validation.

Upcoming Projects on Ares Ecosystem

Ares is more than a ledger—it's a foundation for real-world utilities. Explore the upcoming applications powered entirely by ARES coins:

Super Chat for Streamers

A decentralized tipping and live engagement system for content creators. Streamers receive high-speed micro-donations directly in ARES, bypassing high fees and middleman platforms.

Community E-Commerce

A peer-to-peer marketplace powered by smart contracts. Users buy, sell, and trade physical or digital goods directly with zero platform commissions, backed by community escrow validation.

Decentralized Chat & Mail

End-to-end encrypted email and messaging networks anchored on the Ares blockchain. Regain privacy with absolute resistance to corporate server snooping or data censorship.

Smart Real Estate & EMI

Buy, sell, or rent plots, farms, homes, and shops directly on the blockchain. Secure land titles as smart contracts and purchase properties through automated, flexible monthly installments (EMI) in ARES, bypassing costly bank loans and paperwork.

Immortal Pics & Family Tree

Upload your cherished memories to a permanent, decentralized ledger. Free from costly monthly storage subscriptions, your photos remain immortal for generations. Generate a cryptographically secure family tree linked to your ledger assets.

Payment Gateway & Settlement

Enterprise settlement APIs that allow online businesses to accept ARES payments instantly. Offers sub-penny merchant transaction costs and zero-chargeback settlement guarantees.

The Staking Standard

Delegate your ARES coins to secure the network and receive dynamic yields

9.0% MONTHLY

Yield accrues per-second directly to the smart ledger database, capped at a massive 2.5x lifetime payout on your validation deposit.

Kill Your Bills & Save Money

Why pay out of pocket for utilities when the blockchain can handle them? Earn extra tokens by delegating your ARES to validators and offset your monthly expenses.

Kill the Electricity Bill

Delegate ARES tokens to generate monthly yields that offset home heating, AC, and lighting bills. Secure validation cycles run silently in the background while keeping your lights on.

Wipe Out Internet & Mobile Costs

Ensure your high-speed connectivity is completely free. By locking a modest amount of ARES, the accrued validation rewards easily cover global data and broadband subscriptions.

Cover Server & Hosting Overhead

Are you running nodes, apps, or websites? Delegate your extra resources to validator nodes to receive continuous transaction fee distributions that offset host services entirely.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Aries L1?
Aries is an EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain built using the Cosmos SDK, offering sub-second transactions, high-throughput security, and deflationary transaction fee burning.
How does the 10-level matrix work?
When you refer people who stake ARES, you receive a matching commission percentage of their staking rewards whenever they make a claim. Ranks unlock levels up to 10 deep.
Is my capital locked during staking?
Staked tokens are locked to secure validator nodes, earning a steady 9% monthly accrual until your total payouts (claims + balance) reach the 2.5x lifetime cap.

© 2026 Aries L1 Ledger Protocol. Powered by EVM-Cosmos SDK & Secure Sentry Node Framework.
